final_answer: Pollution harms the ocean deeply. Waste blocks sunlight, disrupting habitats. Many creatures choke on debris. These changes degrade marine ecosystems significantly. Furthermore, toxicity spreads through water. This damages the health of marine ecosystems globally. Cleaning up requires global effort to protect these vital zones.<|im_end|>
